findings: Launch phrasing is narrowly scoped to stampede patterns and lacks explicit commander/metaswarm/SwarmMesh entry phrasing.
Model selection is free-form with no visible premium-policy enforcement.
Live counts are shown in monitor text but not emitted as structured telemetry from the skill.
Stop is not exposed as a first-class command; teardown/resume/status exist instead.
The phase token stampedeing is inconsistent and may break downstream consumers.
